narrative:
Sprigg Township (precinct in Adams County) has 1,143 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
